title: Havoc Squadron

'''Havoc Squadron''' was one of a number of the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The squadron was commanded by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Warvog Arkon]], who was a veteran [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the Alliance as of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. The unit was known to have many recruiters, among them included [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kreezo]] who was stationed at [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], Lady [[Viopa]], who operated out of [[Nym's Base]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Aqzow]], stationed at [[Labor Outpost]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], as well as Arkon himself, who based the unit out of Nym's Stronghold. The unit fell under the overall command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Willham Burke]], who commanded the Fourth Fleet from [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].
